nodes.name: Get overdue invoices for Legal notice

conditions.rightValue: ={{ -$('Config').first().json['Days after Due Date for Legal action'] }}

nodes.name: Prepare Reminder Mail and Letter HTML

assignments.name: Message Content

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "to": {
    "companyName": "{{ $json.Client.Name }}",
    "addressLine1": "{{ $json.Client.Address }}",
    "city": "{{ $json.Client.City }}",
    "provinceOrState": "{{ $json.Client.Province }}",
    "postalOrZip": "{{ $json.Client["Postal Code"] }}",
    "countryCode": "{{ $json.Client["Country Code"] }}"
  },
  "from": {
    "companyName": "{{$('Your Company Details').first().json['Company Name']}}",
    "addressLine1": "{{$('Your Company Details').first().json['Street']}}",
    "city": "{{$('Your Company Details').first().json['City']}}",
    "postalOrZip": "{{$('Your Company Details').first().json['Postal Code']}}",
    "countryCode": "{{$('Your Company Details').first().json['Country Code']}}"
  },
  "html": {{JSON.stringify($json['Message Content'])}},
  "description": "Overdue Invoice Reminder - {{$json.Invoice['Invoice Id']}}",
  "color": false,
  "doubleSided": false,
  "addressPlacement": "top_first_page"
}

nodes.name: Prepare Court summon Mail and Letter HTML

assignments.name: Message Content
assignments.value:
=

{{$('Your Company Details').first().json['Company Name']}}

Official Litigation Notice

NOTICE OF COMMENCEMENT OF LEGAL PROCEEDINGS

TO THE DEFENDANT: {{$json['Name (from Invoice Clients)']}}

You are hereby notified that a legal claim has been prepared for filing in the Civil Court against you. This action follows your failure to satisfy the debt associated with the following records:

CASE REF: LIT-{{$json.Invoice['Invoice Id']}}

STATUS: AWAITING COURT FILING / JUDICIAL REVIEW

Claimant:{{$('Your Company Details').first().json['Company Name']}}
Debt Reference:#{{$json.Invoice['Invoice Id']}}
Principal Claim Amount: {{$json.Invoice.Amount}} PLN

Please be advised that once this matter is registered with the Court, you may be liable for additional costs, including court filing fees and statutory interest, which will significantly increase the total amount owed.

RESOLUTION: To prevent the formal registration of this lawsuit, full payment must be received within 48 hours. Use the bank details provided in previous correspondence.

Best regards,
Legal Department

LEGAL DISCLAIMER: This email serves as an official notification of legal action. If you have already settled this debt, please provide a stamped bank confirmation immediately to stay the proceedings. Failure to respond will result in the entry of a default judgment where applicable.

nodes.name: Prepare Pre-trial summon Mail and Letter HTML

assignments.name: Message Content
assignments.value:
=

{{$('Your Company Details').first().json['Company Name']}}

Legal & Debt Recovery Department

Pre-Trial Summons: Final Demand for Payment

Dear {{$json['Name (from Invoice Clients)']}},

This is a formal pre-trial summons regarding your outstanding debt. Despite previous reminders, your account remains unpaid.

FINAL WARNING: Invoice #{{$json.Invoice['Invoice Id']}} is severely overdue.

Failure to settle this debt within 7 days will result in immediate legal action.

Invoice Number:{{$json.Invoice['Invoice Id']}}
Original Due Date:{{$json.Invoice['Due Date']}}
Total Outstanding Amount: {{$json.Invoice.Amount}} PLN

⚖️ Legal Consequences

If payment is not received, we will initiate litigation which may include:
• Filing a claim in the Civil Court
• Recovery of all legal fees and court costs from your assets
• Statutory interest for late payment

💳 Immediate Settlement Details

Bank Name: {{$('Your Company Details').first().json['Bank Name']}}

Account Number: {{$('Your Company Details').first().json['Bank Account Number']}}

Payment Reference: SETTLEMENT-{{$json.Invoice['Invoice Id']}}

To halt this process, please send proof of transfer to {{$('Your Company Details').first().json['Email']}} immediately.

{{$('Your Company Details').first().json['Company Name']}} | Legal Notice

This document constitutes a formal notice of intent to sue.

assignments.name: =Email Subject
assignments.value: =Will to enter legal route over invoice {{ $json.Invoice["Invoice Id"] }}

parameters.content:
## Automatic vindication of overdue or incoming invoices

### How it works

This workflow automates sending reminders about invoices that due date is comming soon.
Its using [PostGrid](https://www.postgrid.com) for traditional mail, [NocoDB](https://nocodb.com) for storing information about invoices and Gmail for sending E-mails, as well as Slack for notifying user (you!) about notifications that has been sent. 

### Set up

- Fill out "Config" node containing all time spans when each type of notification should be sent
- Fill out "Your Company Details" node containing information about your company. It will be used in E-mail/letter templates as well as used in API call to PostGrid.
- Prepare auth for "Send Letter using PostGrid API" node.
  - Use "Custom Auth" and paste:
```
{
	"headers": {
		"x-api-key": "<Your API Key>"
	}
}
```

### Customize

If you already have tables "Clients" or "Invoices" in NocoDB, you can use different names. In order to do that, you must edit:
1. JSON Body in "Create NocoDB Invoices Table" and "Create NocoDB Clients Table" nodes
2. Row ID Value in "Get client row" node


Need help? Contact us at developers@sailingbyte.com

Happy hacking!

## Fill out configs
"Config" node describes when notifications should be sent as well if autmation should send Email, letter, or both.

"Your Company Details" node is necessary for contents of both Email and letter. Make sure that provided data is correct

## Set up NocoDB Tables first!
This short 'script' will create necessary tables inside NocoDB for you. One thing less to worry about. Make sure you don't have table called `Clients` or `Invoices`

## Step 1: Fetch invoices and client info from NocoDB
In this step we fetch invoice data from NocoDB, then we find matching client for each invoice and merge both together

## Step 2: Filter out invoices we don't care about
We filter out invoices based on couple values like:
- Invoice Status - Must not be "Paid"
- Payment Date - Must not be specified
- Due Date - Combined with config we check if date in the invoice is today or later

Then we split remaining invoices into 3 groups:
- Today/Incoming - These will result in reminder to pay
- For warning - These will result in a message about will to enter legal route
- For legal notice - These will result in a message about fact that we entered legal route

## Step 3: Prepare Email / Letter contents
In this step you can paste your own HTML and use data from previous nodes to customize it.

Email Subject is used not only in Email, but also in Slack Notification. This will make it easier to know what given notification really is about

At the end we combine all 3 inputs into one. It server only aesthetic purpose (increases readability)

## Step 4: Send a notification
In this step we send notification to the client, and notification to Slack channel about it so that we can keep track of what invoices has been processed
